description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a predominantly rectangular structure. The exterior is finished in shades of gray and white, with large glass windows providing ample natural light and a sense of openness. The house includes a spacious driveway, a small pool or water feature, and landscaped elements such as palm trees and a manicured shrub. The building appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back from the lower, creating a tiered effect. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and others smaller and more discrete. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and a small overhang, blending seamlessly into the overall modern aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and minimalist landscaping including palm trees and a pool. The exterior features clean lines, gray and white finishes, and an asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, driveway, pool, and two prominent palm trees behind the house.
description_view_1: Top-down angled view highlighting the flat roofs, upper and lower levels, and the arrangement of landscaping elements.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, tiered roof structure, and the palm trees directly behind the house.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the elongated layout, driveway, and the relationship between the house and the landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a simple door, small overhang, and no prominent decorative elements
